summary: Official historical backfill bundle for R01-R20 imported into the formal proof registry so that the handover baseline can be built from a complete registry without pending/gap slots.
notes: This bundle is the official registry evidence source for R01-R20.
It records historical proof coverage from the prior control-plane hardening workstream.
For R01-R20 the registry now treats this bundle as the attached official evidence source.
